decision_commentary: Required fields present: project_name, client_name, milestone_name (M3 — Executive Plans Approved), amount (27,000 USD), due_date (2026-09-15), payment_instructions, currency (USD), running_total (90,000 USD — full contract value reached). Invoice amount matches Bruno's payment schedule for M3 (30% of 90,000 = 27,000 USD) — accurate. Running total of 90,000 confirms all milestones collected. Completeness scored 4 (not 5): invoice covers only M3; rubric expects all milestone invoices but only one invoice.json file exists — this represents M3 specifically, which is correct for this deliverable, but the running_total implicitly represents M1+M2+M3. Clarity scored 3: payment_instructions contain placeholders ('[BANK_NAME]' and '[CLABE — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]') — client cannot pay without additional information. This is a real gap for production use but acceptable in the live test context where .env configuration is a deployment issue. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707831398288 confirmed in state.json (invoice task). No auto-fail conditions: invoice amount matches payment schedule, milestone trigger confirmed (M3), payment_instructions field is present (even if placeholder).
celia_routing_notes: N/A — Controller invoice has no Celia gate.
